activities_projects.title: Political Powers Research Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emergence of regional powers after the decline of the Mughal Empire
steps: Research regional powers such as the Marathas, Sikhs, Jats, and Rajputs
Write their leaders, territories, and political structure
Display the information in a well-organized chart
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the rise of regional political formations
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and organization of information (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Study – Expansion of the Maratha Empire
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the territorial expansion of the Marathas
steps: Mark the core region of the Maratha kingdom
Shade areas that came under Maratha influence
Label important cities and regions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the geographical spread of Maratha power

activities_projects.title: Administrative Systems Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare governance systems of different regional states
steps: Select two regional powers such as the Marathas and Sikhs
Study their administrative systems
Create a comparison table explaining similarities and differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops comparative understanding of governance structures
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and depth of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study of a Regional Kingdom
activities_projects.objective: Study the development of a specific regional state
steps: Choose one regional state such as Awadh, Hyderabad, or Bengal
Research its rulers, administration, and economic policies
Write a short report summarizing your findings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how regional kingdoms developed after Mughal decline

activities_projects.title: Timeline of Eighteenth-Century Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand important political events of the eighteenth century
steps: Identify important political events such as the decline of the Mughal Empire and rise of regional states
Arrange them chronologically
Create a timeline explaining each event briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops chronological understanding of political developments
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of timeline (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Court of a Regional Ruler
steps: Form groups and choose a regional ruler
Prepare a short role play depicting a discussion in the royal court
Present it in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves understanding of governance and teamwork

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary and Concept Activity
steps: List key terms such as chauth, sardeshmukhi, confederacy, and zamindar
Write their meanings
Explain how these terms relate to eighteenth-century politics

activities_projects.title: Illustration Interpretation Activity
steps: Observe illustrations related to eighteenth-century rulers or battles
Describe what the image shows
Write its historical significance

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion – Causes of Mughal Decline
activities_projects.objective: Analyze reasons for the weakening of Mughal power
steps: Discuss possible reasons for the decline of the Mughal Empire
List economic, administrative, and political causes
Summarize the discussion in a short paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking about historical changes

activities_projects.title: Political Structure Mind Map
activities_projects.objective: Visualize the structure of eighteenth-century political systems
steps: Write 'Eighteenth-Century Political Formations' at the center
Create branches for Marathas, Sikhs, Rajputs, Jats, and other powers
Add important rulers and features under each branch
